wine_bars.name: Prova
wine_bars.address: Rua de Ferreira Borges 86, 4050-252 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars.wine_program: Sommelier-curated list of Portuguese wines from across the regions, poured by the glass and bottle; the host matches each pour to the guest's preferred style
wine_bars.description: Founded by sommelier Diogo Amado near Palacio da Bolsa, Prova is a calm jazz-lit room built around a wide-ranging Portuguese by-the-glass list and guided flights.

wine_bars.name: Vinologia
wine_bars.address: Rua de São João 28-30, 4050-552 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars.wine_program: Around 200 Ports from small-batch independent producers, served by the glass with a focus on grower and single-quinta Ports rarely seen elsewhere
wine_bars.description: Also styled La Maison des Porto, this snug Ribeira room specialises in Port from independent grower houses, with knowledgeable staff guiding tastings of small-production bottlings.

wine_bars.name: Capela Incomum
wine_bars.wine_program: Portuguese-led list weighted to Douro and northern producers, by the glass and bottle, in a deconsecrated 19th-century chapel; Iberian small plates accompany the pours
wine_bars.description: A wine bar set inside a former chapel near the Carregal gardens, pairing a Douro-leaning Portuguese list with Iberian tapas under vaulted stone ceilings.

wine_bars.name: Wine Quay Bar
wine_bars.address: Rua Cais da Estiva 111, 4050-080 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars.wine_program: Curated Portuguese list across Douro, Dao and Alentejo poured by the glass and bottle, served with petiscos beside a 17th-century aqueduct wall and river view
wine_bars.description: A Ribeira riverfront wine bar overlooking the Dom Luis I bridge, with one wall built from a 17th-century aqueduct and a Portuguese list paired to small plates.

wine_bars.name: Arco das Verdades
wine_bars.wine_program: Specialises in the wines of northern Portugal, by the glass and bottle, served from a perch with sweeping views over the Ribeira and the Douro toward Gaia
wine_bars.description: A small terraced wine bar above the Ribeira with large windows framing the Luis I bridge and the river, focused on the wines of northern Portugal.

wine_bars.name: Genuíno
wine_bars.address: Rua de Miguel Bombarda 78, 4050-381 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars.wine_program: Natural-wine focus: a rotating list of organic, low-intervention Portuguese and European bottles by the glass, served alongside local seasonal small plates
wine_bars.description: A natural-wine bar, shop and kitchen on the Miguel Bombarda gallery strip, pouring low-intervention Portuguese and European bottles with seasonal organic plates.

wine_bars.name: Tapabento
wine_bars.wine_program: Deep Portuguese list weighted to Douro and northern producers, by the glass and bottle, paired with seafood petiscos behind São Bento station
wine_bars.description: A petiscos and wine room tucked behind São Bento station, known for a Portuguese list strong on Douro alongside seafood-leaning small plates.

wine_bars.name: Castas e Pratos Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Rua José Vasques Osório, 5050-280 Peso da Régua, Portugal
wine_bars.wine_program: Over 600 references heavy on Douro and Port, with a dedicated wine-bar counter pouring by the glass inside a restored railway warehouse
wine_bars.description: The wine-bar counter of the Castas e Pratos warehouse in Régua, drawing on a 600-bottle cellar weighted to Douro and Port for by-the-glass pours overlooking the rail tracks.

verified.address_quoted: Rua José Vasques Osório, 5050-280 Peso da Régua

wine_bars.name: Garrafeira Soares São João
wine_bars.address: Rua de S. João 70, 4050-552 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars.wine_program: Long-established garrafeira with a by-the-glass counter pouring aged Port across many vintages plus Douro DOC wines from its shelves
wine_bars.description: A São João garrafeira where bottles of aged Port across decades are sold and poured by the glass at the counter, alongside Douro table wines.

verified.address_quoted: R. de S. João, nº70 4050-552 Porto
